title: 宝塚記念の後に・2つの理想

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heated match comes to an end. The racers
clashed with their separate ways of running. And
then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Bright's eyes are locked on Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You were incredible...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Have I seen anyone run like that ever before?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe I have... That was something I... it
was something no Mejiro is capable of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So that was the real you, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It was, Bright. But I'm still far from perfect. I still
haven't reached that scenery...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But, at the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I see... Then that means I shall also have to polish
myself to a brighter sheen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Just like how the scenery you seek remains out of
reach...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The Mejiro's ideal still lies beyond me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Um... Regardless, Suzuka, would you race against
me once again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Before, I may have inspired you. But today, you
were the one who taught me something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm not done yet. I can still run in a way that is
more fitting to the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So... at the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's a promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two speak frankly to one another. Mutually
motivated, they head toward the ultimate stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho. I feel like something
special will happen after what I've seen here
today. To be at our best, we'll have to train like
never before.
